_meta.source: CA HCD ADU Handbook + AB 2221, SB 897, AB 976, SB 1211, SB 543, AB 462, AB 1154, SB 9 (2025 session)
_meta.principle: State ADU law preempts local LA ordinances. Where state law is more permissive, STATE LAW WINS.
_meta.2026_update_note: Four new ADU bills signed by Governor Newsom (Oct 2025), effective Jan 1, 2026. SB 543 is the most significant — allows multi-ADU combinations on single-family lots.

state_minimums.max_size_guarantee_note: 800 sqft of interior livable space allowed regardless of FAR or lot size (SB 543 clarifies 'interior livable space' as measurement standard)
state_minimums.setback_note: 4 ft maximum — local cannot be stricter
state_minimums.front_setback_note: Cannot block 800 sqft ADU if no other location available
state_minimums.height_transit_note: 18 ft if within ½ mile of major transit stop
state_minimums.parking_note: Cannot require replacement parking for demolished garage OR uncovered space
state_minimums.fire_sprinklers_note: Cannot require sprinklers in primary dwelling for ADU
state_minimums.permit_completeness_note: Applications must be reviewed for completeness within 15 business days (SB 543)
state_minimums.permit_note: 60 days total; must provide written denial reasons
state_minimums.appeal_note: Local agencies must provide appeal process and reach determination within 60 days of receipt (SB 543)
state_minimums.impact_fee_note: ADUs ≤ 750 sqft exempt from impact fees

multi_adu_rules.note: Single-family lots can combine different ADU types

allowed_combinations.note: Converted from existing garage, basement, or other space
Junior ADU — interior livable space measurement (SB 543)

multi_adu_rules.jadu_owner_occupancy: Only required if JADU shares sanitation with primary dwelling (AB 1154, 2026)

emergency_provisions.note: If detached ADU is in a county subject to state emergency proclamation on/after Feb 1, 2025, local agencies must issue certificate of occupancy for ADU even if primary dwelling not yet reconstructed

local_ordinance_enforcement.note: If local agency fails to provide HCD a copy of new/amended ADU ordinance within 60 days or respond to deficiencies within 30 days, the ordinance is null and void. State law becomes sole authority.

fault_zone.note: Fault zone may impose additional setback requirements

hpoz.note: Historic Preservation Overlay Zone requires design review

coastal.note: Coastal Commission review may be required — but AB 462 may apply if in emergency-declared area

ladbs_preapproved.benefit: Pre-approved plans reduce approval to 21-30 days (vs 8-12 weeks for custom)
ladbs_preapproved.customization: Limited — can change windows, doors, colors, rotate floor plan. Larger changes lose pre-approved status.
